libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No required environment variables or system properties. Prefer offline tests around Values, Value.as(...), mapping annotations, temporal/list/value types, and driver configuration paths unless a test deliberately exercises real Bolt query execution.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8857 [Automation] java run fails for org.neo4j.driver:neo4j-java-driver:5.28.8; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Documentation examples normally connect to bolt://localhost:7687, so tests that exercise actual query execution would need an explicit Neo4j server, but that is not required for the current java-run failure or for meaningful offline reachability coverage.
The artifact includes native-image properties for Netty (-Dio.netty.noUnsafe=true and leak detection disabled); these are packaged with the jar and do not require separate test setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is concretely required. The resolved Neo4j Java Driver artifact brings its needed transitive dependencies, ships its own native-image properties, and existing meaningful coverage is reachable through offline value/mapping APIs without a live Neo4j server.
